nodes.description: The Quick Explorer Trail is a 1–2 hour, 3 km loop covering 30+ animals, perfect for a quick visit. It passes through key zones and features big cats, primates, bears, and aquatic and reptile species.
A 2–3 hour, 6 km loop covering 45+ species like Tigers, Rhinos, Elephants, and Lions. It’s a kid-friendly route with rest stops and starts and ends at the main gate.

The Explorer Tour (Green Route) is a 4-hour, 7–8 km loop covering all 10 stops and 60+ species. It offers a complete wildlife experience with highlights like tigers, elephants, rare deer, primates, and diverse birdlife.
Raptors Buggy Point, a stop on the Explorer Tour, featuring Great Horned Owl, Striped Hyena, Black Kite, Brahminy Kite, Egyptian Vulture, and Wild Boar.
